titleStmt.title: SII 38.196: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 196. (A.R. No. 196 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Harihara II Year: Dundubhi, Kanni, full moon, Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi.

summary.p: This inscription records the terms of agreement among the padiyilār, vīrachōḻaraṇukkar, dēvaraḍiyār and kaikkōḷar, of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, who assembled before Paiyyūr mudaliyār Amarakōnār. According to the terms of contract ishabattaḷiyilār were to perform agamārgam and sindhu dances inside the maṇḍapa excluding Nāchchiyār-tirumaṇḍapa. The dēvaraḍiyār were to dance on the tiruvādirai day at the maṇḍapa, when Mudaliyār Perumāḷ was pleased to appear at the Nāchchiyārtirumaṇḍapa.

Again, ishabattaḷiyilār were to worship on the right side and dēvaraḍiyār on the left side on the occasion of the worship of Vaiyirava-Nāyinār and ishabattaḷiyilār were not to dance at the Kūttapperumāḷ-maṇḍapa.
Tirujñānasambandan and Vāgīśura-paṇḍitaṉ, who expounded Sōmasiddhāntam figure as a signatories to this arrangement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmaṉ . AriyāraRead ariyarāyaryarkku cellāniṉṟa tuntumi varuṣattuk kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu pavuṟaṇaiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉārThe letter yaṉār is engraved below.koyil patiyilārum viracoḻaaṇukkarum tevar Aṭiyārum poṟkoyil kaikkoḷarum taṅkaḷil Iraṇṭutiṟavarum paiyyarmutaliyār Amarakoṉār muṉpāka porunti poruntiṉapaṭikku kalluveṭṭi
ṉa nācciyārtirumaṇṭapam Oḻinta Uḷḷurmaṇṭapaṅkaḷilum puṟamput tiruttoppu maṇṭapaṅkaḷilum tiruppaḷḷi Aṟaiyilum tiruvātirait tirunāḷukkum mutaliyār perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Irunta pala maṇṭapaṅkaḷilum Iṣapattaḷiyilār Akamāṟkamucintukkum Āṭi variyum Āṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum tiruvātiraittirunāḷukku nācciyār tirumaṇṭapattile perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi teṟke
mukamākac ciṅkātaThe letter ‘ta’ is engraved below.ṉam cevittu Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu Aṟaiyum tirukkaṇcātti Aruḷit tevaraṭiyārai Akamāṟkam cintum variyum kaṇṭaruḷak kaṭavatākavum tiruvātiraittirunāḷukku tiruppaḷḷi Aṟaiyilum Aṟai tirukkaṇcātti Aruḷa Eḻuntaruḷiṉāl Eḻuntaruḷiṉa nāḻikai mutal perumāḷtirumaṇṭapattil Oṉṟu pāti nāḻikaiyum nācciyārtirumaṇṭapattile Oṉṟu pāti nāḻikai
yum tirukkaṇcātti Aruḷak kaṭavatu Ākavum tiruottacāmam paṇi maṭaṅkiṉāl vayiravanāyaṉār caṉṉatiyile pūcai muṭiyumpoḻutu Iṣapat taḷiyilārai valappuṟattilum tevaraṭiyār Iṭappuṟattilum cevikka kaṭavārka va kūttaperumāḷ(māḷ) maṇṭapattil Iṣapattaḷiyilār Āṭakkaṭavarkaḷ Allavākavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum tappāmal naṭaBy the side another inscription is found engraved a) svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu eṭṭā ••••••• b) kā kaṉṟāppūruṭaiyān perumānākkakaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruñāṉacampantaṉ Eḻuttu
somasiddhān=tam vakkāṇikkum vāgiśvarapaṇḍitar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
